The '''blast cannon''' was a type of blaster [[Shotgun/Legends|shotgun]] weapon. A blast cannon could fire up to seven shots at once. One type of blast cannon was the [[CR-1 blaster cannon/Legends|CR-1 model]] used by members of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. A blast cannon that looked strikingly similar to the [[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifle]] was used by [[Phase Zero dark trooper]]s.

{{Weapon-stub}}
